title: AI Suggestion (Draft-for-Approval)
description: The ONLY write path for AI-proposed changes. AI files a suggestion; a human reviews; only then is anything applied. Backend source of truth: ai_suggestions migration (2026_06_03_100200) + Modules\Ai\Models\AiSuggestion. NOTE: the DB default status is 'pending' (planning docs say 'draft' — the code wins; update docs, not the enum).

user_id.description: User whose session produced the suggestion.

suggestion_type.description: Machine-readable kind, e.g. insight_report, catalog_import_draft, reorder_plan_draft. Register new types here as they ship.

payload.description: Type-specific content. For insight_report: { period, figures: {...}, narrative }. Grounding rule: every number in narrative MUST exist in figures.

status.description: pending (default) -> approved|rejected by reviewer; approved -> applied when executed. No other transitions.

reviewed_by.description: Reviewer user id; null until reviewed.
